cart.title: The Tribute Cart
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please append a tribute collection address to proceed with your commission.
cart.deleteInvoice: Strike Tax Notice from the Record
cart.howToPay: How dost thou wish to render tribute?
cart.addCardPrompt: To append a sealed coin, please click on the Append New Sealed Coin proclamation.
cart.allUpToDate: Thou art all up to date!
cart.thankYouForOrder: The Crown thanks thee for thy commission.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please render tribute for service activation. When tribute is received, your service shall be immediately activated.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After tribute is rendered, open a royal petition with the transaction ID, date, and amount rendered. We shall manually credit the payment.

creditCard.name: Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is needed before your sealed coin is available for use. InterServer shall charge your sealed coin with two amounts under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges shall appear on your tribute collection statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If you do not see these charges, please consult your sealed coin issuer for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are only for verification purposes and shall be voided within 3-5 days, depending on your bank.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Swear fealty to your sealed coin's online banking or call your bank to verify the two amounts charged. They often show under Pending Charges with your bank. These authorization charges shall disappear in about 3-5 days depending on your bank.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to your sealed coin. The values must be in USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on your sealed coin statement may be in a different coinage from the one required on the last confirmation page described above. If your sealed coin statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required coinage, you shall have to consult your sealed coin company. They should be able to tell you the amounts of the two charges in the original coinage.
creditCard.deleteCreditCard: Strike Sealed Coin from the Record
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to strike your sealed coin {card} from the record?
creditCard.yesDelete: Aye, strike it from the record.
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This sealed coin has been authenticated and granted permission for use in our royal system.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to grant permission for this sealed coin for use.

paymentSuccess.title: Tribute Rendering — So It Is Decreed!
paymentSuccess.successful: Tribute Rendering — So It Is Decreed!
paymentSuccess.thankYou: The Crown thanks thee for thy tribute. Thy transaction has been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Tribute Payment Tokens
paymentTypes.ccNote: All sealed coins must be verified before they can be used. To verify them, click the "Verify" proclamation.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoice: Strike Tax Notice from the Record?
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to strike your tax notice {id} from the record?

prepays.title: Pre-Paid Tribute
prepays.noHistoryFound: The royal archives hold no such history!
prepays.showingPage: Showing page {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically apply to new tax notices
prepays.deletePrepay: Strike Pre-Paid Tribute from the Record
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are you sure you want to strike your pre-paid tribute #{id} and its related history from the record?
